english: And thus, death descended upon Tarkov
start_summary: Quest[target=675e4307c26e93866ad36d9c; status=4] || Quest[target=675e44ef86f0af6fce9195a4; status=4] || Quest[target=675e458cdb219e98dda39bc9; status=4]

english: I see you've begun your training of the physical, practical, and the mental skills... Good! I'm glad to see you taking care of yourself so well. I bet you were starting to wonder if we were ever going to focus on combat, weren't you? Besides, I'm an angel, I'm supposed to be pure and holy, right? Oh believe me, we are. That's why we need this. Let's be honest, this region has gone the way of Sodom and Gomorrah. Everyone's either killing each other, or profiting off everyone else killing each other. It's become a wasteland. Worst off all, the cult's presence has grow way out of hand. I don't know how many times we have to remind people who the only God is, but we're going to do it again. You're going to rain fire and brimstone down on this place, mercenary. You will become the must destructive force in Tarkov, and will remain here until He is finished with this place. Expect no easy tasks here, friend. War is hell, and you're riding on the red horse. Let the slaughter commence.
start_summary: Quest[target=675e4307c26e93866ad36d9c; status=4] || Quest[target=675e44ef86f0af6fce9195a4; status=4] || Quest[target=675e458cdb219e98dda39bc9; status=4]

english: Let the slaughter commence

english: The great tribulation of Tarkov has begun. I want you to know that we aren't exactly 'happy' when it comes to these sorts of things. We don't get some religious high when we destroy evil cities like this. It's just what it is. You, however... you may enjoy it as much as you like.
start_summary: Quest[target=675e4307c26e93866ad36d9c; status=4] || Quest[target=675e44ef86f0af6fce9195a4; status=4] || Quest[target=675e458cdb219e98dda39bc9; status=4]

english: In one raid, complete all tasks: Kill 10 enemies
Kill 1 enemy further than 40 meters
Kill 1 enemy within 15 meters
Kill 1 enemy with an AR/DMR
Kill 1 enemy with an SMG/SG
Kill 1 enemy with a pistol
Kill 3 enemies with headshots.
(All 'accept' inbox messages from this trader will be comments your character is making.) No one's left behind? Yeah, right.

Command abandoned you. Your squad has fallen in battle. Tarkov has collapsed into complete disarray, and now you are caught in the middle of it. Screw the mission, screw whatever TerraGroup is or isn't doing. Your focus now is simply getting out of this hellhole.
Abandoned
You haven't died yet. Have a bonus.
How am I still here...?

There's no way you could have survived those wounds. You know you died, you felt the pain, you lost consciousness, and yet... somehow you're still here, without the injuries. In fact, everything is still here. The locations remain unchanged, your safehouse is still here... it seems only the gear you had on you is lost. Either your dreams are too realistic... or something is terribly, terribly wrong here. You decide to investigate, though you have no clue where to begin, or even how. Perhaps just looking around?
What...?

Your search reveals nothing. You don't even know what you're looking for; how do you expect to find anything? You suddenly hear a voice, '...must be the one. They clearly know abo-' the voice cuts off. You feel watched.
Do I trust this voice?

First you die and come back, now you're hearing voices... and here you thought this might be a simple deployment. Now you're wrapped up in something, and it seems that not even death can save you. Perhaps all you can do is keep looking... or perhaps you should attempt to call out to the voice. You heard it; maybe it will hear you.
***Confusion***
***Your choice is made***
Gotta play the game, I guess
quest_name: The original purpose of this mod

english: Escape from this place
Complete the first quest in 20 skill categories:
quest_name: The original purpose of this mod

english: Who's calculating this 'level' crap? I'm just trying not to die
So, you wish to work on the mental skills? What good is knowledge if it cannot be applied? Show me that you're going to be sticking around a while.
One with Tarkov
I don't really know why you're staying. You're supposed to be escaping, right? Must be harder than it sounds...
Time to hit the gym!

So, you wish to train your body? This only makes sense: Your mind may plan all it wants, it's not the thing physically being shot at. You need to be able to withstand merciless punishment if you want to survive in Tarkov. Well, you 'survive' regardless, but you know what I mean. If you want a healthy body, you need a place away from gunfire to train it. Construct yourself a nice gym, and use it.
Workout

How was it? Feel the burn in your muscles? Good. Let us begin our physical training, then. Be warned, your body will be pushed to the absolute limits. Not that it will matter, if gunshot wounds don't stop you, I doubt anything will. Oh, also, I do NOT approve of the posters you put up...
Enjoy your workout! (Use the Gym once)
Can I call room service?

Since it looks like you're going to be staying here for a while, you'll need a place to live, as well as a place to keep all that stuff you have. You found someplace already, no? You should put some effort into it. A home you love will love you back.
Settling in
Yeah, that little bunker is starting to look inhabitable! Keep working on it, you'll need it later.
Reach hideout management 4
Steel sights, steel bullets. ...they're lead? Darn.
Being able to aim properly is probably the most important skill you can have here in Tarkov. Let's first get some practice with iron sights, since they're always going to be avalible.
Iron vision
Good shooting! Let's get you something fancier now
Kill 10 enemies with only iron sights
If the sight is a 1x sight, why does my vision scope in? Tarkov is a weird place
1x sights may not give you better range, but you'll get a much clearer picture of your target, allowing for much easier aim and recoil control. Find one you like and use it as much as you can!
Reflexive aim

Do you prefer reflex or holographic sights? Personally, I'm more of a reflex sight guy, I like the little dots over the bigger designs of holographics. Both have their perks though, don't let me sway you either way.
Kill 30 enemies with 1x sights
Twice the range, twice the killing

2x sights are a great choice for those quasi-close quarters engagememts. It's a shame only two of them made their way to Tarkov. Oh well. Let's make this one a bit more interesting, try putting a bit of distance between you and your opponent.
Double trouble
Did you end up liking either of the two? If you didn't, you never have to use them again.
Kill 30 enemies over 20 meters away with 2x sights
quest_name: BONUS QUEST: Too much challenge (Combat tier 3)

english: I mean, it's kind of aiming.

All this time holding the gun steady in front of your face... it's not the only way to shoot. In fact, it's not always the best way to shoot. Sometimes it's better if you know where your bullets are gonna go without looking through a sight. Let's see if your point fire is as good as your aimed fire.
Doing the opposite
Ah, so you are actually pointing your gun in the right spot. Very good.
Kill 40 enemies while hip / point firing
looooooooooooooooooooooooooooong range
Tarkov is quite a big place, don't you think? Plenty of areas have vast landscapes as far as the eye can see. There's plenty of land for a large scope to look over.
All-seeing
Did you find some good spots for LDS?
Kill 50 enemies over 70 away with 6x+ sights
Anything full auto is good with me

Assault rifles are the most plentiful catagory of weapons in Tarkov, and more seem to be getting shipped in. They're also the most balanced, being usable in any distance. That means, if you have to pick one type of weapon to use, assault rifles makes the most sense. Let's get you started.
Commence the Assault
They're good, right? It's a shame they're usually on the expensive side.
Kill 20 enemies with an Assault Rifle
Biggest target, best chance to hit

You seem pretty interested in assault rifles, eh? Let's make sure you know where to shoot. Center mass is going to be your best bet with AR's, unless you're confident in your headshots. Don't bother with the limbs, and try to avoid flesh ammo for this.
Cutting through the middle
Was armor giving you a lot of trouble? Ammo matters more than guns here. Make sure what you're loading up can pierce medium armors!
Kill Knight with a SCAR-H, MDR 7.62, MK47, OR MCX-SPEAR 6.8
I know some good places to do this.

The best thing about assault rifles is that they are useful in almost every situation. Excluding the extreme ranges, you will find your rifle able to stand its ground anywhere. You're probably used to medium range, so let's see how you do in close and long range.
The most versatile weapon class
Did you end up using full-auto for close, and semi-auto for long? Or maybe your favorite rifle is only semi auto!
Land 30 headshots with an Assault Rifle
Kill 15 enemies within 15 meters with an Assault rifle.
I'm taking his mask, as well...

Surely you've run into the goons by now, right? That Knight guy is quite a boss, rushing without fear. Why don't you show him who's the real boss around here? Take him out, and use one of his own guns to do it.
The Pawn takes the Knight
And the pawn moves D2 to take the knight!
Well, that's a lot of work.
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: You won't believe how many of these things there are in Tarkov. They keep shipping new ones in too! I have to keep up with that if I can... why are there so many Kalashnikovs, anyways? Oh well. Since there's so many, let's group them up by caliber and fire modes. So, weapons that can ONLY do single fire will be separated from those that can do full auto. Ah, as a bonus, I want to see a couple extreme range kills as well as a few extremely close range kills.
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: Master of firearms: Assault rifles / Carbines
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: You should be able to pick up any assault rifle you come across and use it like a master! Very good job.
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: Kill 5 PMCs with semi-auto 5.45x39mm
quest_name: Master of firearms: Assault Rifles / Carbines

english: Powerful, accurate, can fire quickly... these are good.
Designated Marksman Rifles are a great hybrid weapon. You get most of the power of a bolt-action sniper rifle, and most of the versatility of an assault rifle. Let's get familiar with them, shall we?
Designating targets
Nice shots! The semi auto makes them a bit less desirable at close quarters, but the high damage and slow ammo consumption also makes it beneficial.
Kill 15 enemies with a DMR
Gotta aim high...
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Since DMRs fire high caliber rounds, you should only be shooting vitals. 2 to the thorax, or 1 to the head will put down most targets that aren't heavily armored. Show me you know where to aim!
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Yeah, just like that. Keep doing that, you're gonna have an easy time.
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Kill Shturman with an SVDS or a G28
Now how do I want to go about this...

Marksman rifles assume there's a marksman in you... not only does this mean that you defeat your targets properly, but that you know when it is time to disengage. I have a special challenge for you: Kill a certain number of people in one raid, while staying below a damage threshold. You might want a secondary weapon to protect you on your way to extract once its done.
Quality over Quantity
Pretty good shooting there, friend. It's good for your bank account too, y'know. Less bullets used = less money spent.
Land 75 shots on the thorax with a DMR
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Land 20 headshots with a DMR
quest_name: Shot through the heart. Yes, you're to blame.

english: Hate that guy...
If you want to be a good marksman, it might be worth taking a few notes from that guy watching over the sawmill in Woods. Why don't you go show him that you're better at spotting than he is?
New park ranger
Nice shots! The semi auto makes them a bit less desirable at close quarters, but the high damage and slow ammo consumption also makes it beneficial.
Where am I gonna get that MK-18?
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Don't you wish there were more DMRs in Tarkov? Such a nice weapon type... oh well. Since there's so few, you gotta use each of them.
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Nowhere is safe from your eye. Beautiful shooting, mate.
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the HK G28
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the M1A
Kill 15 PMCs with the MK-18
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the RSASS
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the SR-25
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the SVDS
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Kill 15 PMCs with the VSS
quest_name: Master of firearms: Designated Marksman Rifles (part 1)

english: Lock and load.
Some new LMGS around here recently, you noticed? High caliber as well, rather deadly... Why not learn how to use them?
Suppressive fire
How's the weight? They really aren't being very truthful when they call it 'light', are they?
Kill 20 enemies with LMGs
Das a lotta boolets

You know what's great about an LMG? You can just keep firing that sucker. That means any place is good for shooting, cause they're gonna fall eventually. Go shoot a bunch of people. Cause it's fun. Or something. Who caused this, again? The fall of humanity has really led to some interesting places.
Spray and pray
300 new holes were created. Do what you will with this information. Just know that He is watching.
Back when he was cool...
Have you ever tried mounting those things? They're so heavy, having something to rest is on should be quite useful to you... go give it a try.
Tachanka style
Much less recoil, less stamina usage... it does leave you stationary, but that's ok sometimes! Just hope they don't have a grenade and you're fine.
Kill 30 enemies while mounted with an LMG
I should bring proper ammo for this...
You know who else uses an LMG around here? Killa. That name is feared everywhere, so I've heard. You should have nothing to fear, being unable to die. Go knock him out, with his own weapon.
Shopping for stripes
The shops of the Interchange mall are much safer now. He'll be back though, just like you. Isn't it weird how they seem to 'respawn' as well? Quite a cursed game someone is playing here in Tarkov.
Kill 20 PMCs with the M60(E4 or E6)
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Gonna need a lot of big bullets for this
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Can you believe how few LMGs there are in Tarkov? I thought more would have arrived by now... I suppose there's 6, now. You know what that means, though... gonna be using each one quite a lot. Also, you should utilize mounting some more. See if you can find some good spots for it!
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: You really know how to lock it down, well done! Defense is yours
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the PKP
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the RPD
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the RPDN

english: Kill 20 PMCs with the RPK-16
quest_name: Master of firearms: Light Machine Guns

english: hehehehehehehe

I don't care for melee weapons. They don't do you much good here, for some reason. Apparently stabbing someone in the face is only a minor inconvinence to them, and they're not much payoff. However, you're also choosing to do this, so whatever. Go stab three people, you psychopath.
Stab stab stab
You've been chopped.
Kill 3 enemies with a melee weapon
Poor guys
Actually getting a melee is extremely tricky, unless you have the armour of a battleship, or you can disable your enemy. Luckily, you can disable your enemy.
Taking advantage
That's the best strategy if you're going to melee. Keep doing that.
Melee 4 enemies that are stunned by a flash grenade.
Sounds good to me
The only place that's going to be any use to melee someone is the head. Go bonk someone on the head a few times.
Right in the noggin
That's how you do it. Good bonking
Hit an enemy in the head with a melee weapon 10 times
Might be a bit more difficult. I'll bring plenty of stun grenades
Time to have some fun with it, eh? Make sure you get a couple real guys as well.
Slice and dice
Alright, Jack, that's enough. Only one last thing to do.
Kill 10 enemies with melee
Kill 3 PMCs with melee
A dance with the devil, eh?

You're still working on your melee weapons, are ya? Well then, allow me to give you the biggest challenge I can give. There is a boss here in Tarkov that also uses a melee weapon. I'm sure you know who it is. I learned something, if you can kill him with a melee weapon, you'll be able to take his hammer. How's that sound?
Dance with the devil

Very impressive! Enjoy the new hammer, Jack. Though something that rips would be more your style, eh? Ah well. (WARNING: You normally do not have access to this hammer, so while it *technically* works, your character model will freak out and the 'stab' attack does not work. It's really fun though, and holding it actually gives you a speed boost for some reason. Use at your own risk!)
Kill Tagilla with a melee weapon
Short kings represent

Pistols aren't the best choice for most situations, especially if you seperate pistols and revolvers. However, their small size means you can bring one in addition to a main weapon without any issue. They are also quite cheap, and are found frequently. Let's make sure that you'll be able to switch to an effective weapon.
Small guns are still lethal
Always remember: Switching to your sidearm is faster than reloading
Kill 5 enemies with pistols
Hmmm... HP, or AP?

Pistols aren't that great for killing, but they're great for softening up targets, crippling them, leaving then vulenrable for you to finish off later. That being said, any bullet to a head will do just fine. Let's try shooting head, thorax, and legs with these.
Softening

As you can see, no pistol is effective against medium-high armor, except maybe the 5-7 with the best ammo... but legs can't be armored, making them a great target. The exception to this rule is the Glock18C, which spits out bullets so ungodly fast that it just kinda works anyways. Watch the recoil!
I own a musket for home defense, actually...
You really shouldn't be using a pistol beyond close range. Pistols aren't designed for that. Really, they are a self defense weapon in CQB situations. Let's see if you can use it as intended.
Self-defense
Works pretty well up close, right? To be fair, almost anything does... Oh well.
Land 10 headshots with pistols
Land 40W thorax shots with pistols
Land 50 leg shots with pistols
Good thing he doesn't wear armor.
There's no boss in Tarkov that 'uses' a pistol, but there is a boss that has one. A golden one, in fact. Show him that the pistol is better without the greed infused into it, will you?
Vanity
Well done! I think Jaeger will want that golden pistol, if you grabbed it.
Kill Reshala with the TT (cannot be the Gold varient)
I sure hope I find PMCs without helmets, because some of these pistols are gonna suck to use...

Ooooo, so you still want to improve your pistol skill??? Sounds good to me. How about 5 with each one? Little less than the others, being a sidearm and all that. ...Eh, group all those semi-auto 9x19s together. Use them at point-blank instead.
Master of firearms: Pistols
Very well done!! Your ability with pistols is unlike any other. And you even got one with the toy gun? How on earth did you manage that?
Kill 5 PMCs with the APB or APS
Kill 5 PMCs with the 5-7
Kill 15 PMCs with semi-auto 9x19 pistols

Kill 5 PMCs with the USP.45
Kill an enemy with the Blicky (Might wanna hurt them first...)
Kill 5 PMCs with the .357 Desert Eagle
Kill 5 PMCs with a .50 AE Desert Eagle
on his hip

Revolvers are an interesting weapon for sure. They're the size of a pistol, but most pack the punch of a sniper rifle. The cost is, well, literal monetary cost, as well as recoil and ammo capacity. Every shot counts here!
Big iron
Nice aim! Make sure you're hitting important places, not much worth in shooting the arms here or legs here.
Kill 10 enemies with a revolver
Happy to take him out, actually

Due to low ammo capacity, you really have to hit important stuff with revolvers. You should only be aiming for the head and thorax, you don't have enough ammo to kill quickly through the flesh, even with specialized ammo.
Between the eyes (and the lungs)
Yep, that's about it. See ya.
Kill Gluhar with the Rsh-12
Hurray, a somewhat fun quest!

You know those old western movies where they just take the revolver right out of the holster and fire without hardly aiming. Yeah, it's kinda cool, kinda silly. But 'point firing' is actually a very useful thing. Revolvers seem like a good thing to practice with! ...Hey, speaking of cowboy movies...
Aiming? What for?
It's highhhhh noon. Actually, it's probably midnight. You're playing Tarkov, admit it.
Land 15 headshots with revolvers
Land 30 thorax shots with revolvers
Happy to take him out, actually
You know the military reserve base, correct? There's this squad of guys that acts like they own the place, it's kind of annoying. Put a round through him, make sure he remembers it when he respawns.
Reserved for him
Well done! He'll be keeping an eye out for you from now on, that's for sure.
Kill 10 enemies with revolvers while wearing the Kinda Cowboy hat
This makes the third quest in Tarkov that requires cowboy hats. Interesting.

This likely isn't your first T5 weapon challenge, so I'll spare you the details. I'm gonna let you off easy on the 200ds here, but to make up for it, I expect very high kill counts for the RSh-12, got it?
Master of firearms: Revolvers
Master of the sidearms! Great job.
Kill 5 PMCs with the CR 200DS
Kill 10 PMCs with the CR 50DS

One of the more satisfying weapon catagories

Despite how big Tarkov is, there's still plenty of buildings and other small areas. If you want to dominate CQC, shotguns are the way to go. Slugs, buckshots, flechettes, plenty of ammo choices, all extremely deadly. Don't forget that you're locked in single fire!
Pump it up
Do you prefer pump actions or semi-autos? Pump action is more satisfying, but semi-auto is more effective.
Kill 15 enemies with shotguns
Gonna shred some folks

Shotguns are great because just about everywhere you can shoot will be effective one way or another. Legs will chew through quickly, but plenty of ammo will also get through any armor just by breaking it down. The only real 'bad' place to shoot is the arms, it just doens't do enough damage. Practice shooting everywhere but the arms (you'll probably hit the arms anyways, going for thorax)
Shoot 'em everywhere (but the arms)
Shotguns are deadly, aren't they? They're vicious, even at medium ranges. Keep aiming in that middle third, and you'll be all good.
Kill Tagilla with the Saiga-12
Those poor plates.

Shotguns are great because just about everywhere you can shoot will be effective one way or another. Legs will chew through quickly, but plenty of ammo will also get through any armor just by breaking it down. The only real 'bad' place to shoot is the arms, it just doens't do enough damage. Practice shooting everywhere but the arms (you'll probably hit the arms anyways, going for thorax)
The grinder
Nicely done! Most slugs aren't too effective against armour, but some buckshot and especially the flechette rounds just disentegrate it.
Land 15 headshots with shotguns
Land 150 thorax or stomach shots with shotguns (each pellet counts!)
Land 300 leg shots with shotguns (each pellet counts!)
That's a lot of health to chew through with a shotgun...
That factory is quite the death trap, isn't it? Nowhere to hide, all close quarters, and the boss there is an absolute menace with his Saiga-12.    ...hmm... what if you became the boss of factory?
Bringing the facility back online
You da real boss now! Good stuff, man. Own that factory
155 with the 155... oh, I have to use all of them? Oh well.

Alright, you know what to do. Every shotgun. Paint the world red. Let's get 15 with each, alright? Hmm... You can combine the 153 and 155, I don't mind. And just get 5 on the toz. Shred some armour for me in the meantime! Watching numbers go up is fun, for some reason.
Master of firearms: Shotguns
Truly an artist, you are! You are the master of shotguns

Sarah Michelle Gellar? Oh, Sub Machine Gun, ok.

Submachine guns are an excellect choice for Tarkov. They are perfect for close quarters, yet can perform decently at medium range. They aren't great for armor penetration, but their high fire rate makes up for it. Depending on the SMG, the recoil can range from rough to non-existent. Good luck!
Sub machine guns aren't sub-par
How's it feel? Small, hopefully controllable, easy to handle, it's a great to shoot. It's a shame it doesn't do as much damage, though.
Kill 15 enemies with submachine guns
Fast fire rate, fast completion

english: Sub machine guns, with maaybe the exception of the P90, are pretty weak against any high level armour. That means leg shots are going to be the main source of killing when it comes to these things. However, not everyone has good armour, and even those with good armour still have holes in that protection, so thorax shots are perfectly fine as well. And of course, a few headshots never hurt. Get on it.

So, truly... if you're using an SMG, you're most likely going for the legs. Yes, there are a few exceptions that can deal with mid-level armour, but you're going for the squishy bits most of the time. You know a place that can't be armoured (for some reason)? Yep, same as last time. Knock 'em over!
I said sweep those legs!

That Sanitar guy... man. You have not seen what he has done, let me tell you. Normally, these boss hunting missions are just a fun challenge, but this... I need you to put this guy down. I know he'll revive, he always does, but put him down anyways. His... 'work' on God's creations are unholy. Kill him with his own gun, I want him to remember this.
Machine to the medic
Thank you. I know he'll be back, but, I'm glad we could at least do that.
9x19=190, no prob- Oh wait, nevermind.
Haven't had enough yet? Alright, let's see you use a lot of those SMGs on the real guys then! I won't be too picky on similar smgs, but I want you to obliterate every leg that isn't your own.
Master of firearms: SMGs
Master of the SMGs! That was quite a lot of PMC kills, well done. Take a break.

Slow and steady

Bolt action Sniper rifles are the most deadly single-shot weapons in existance when it comes to small-arms. Their downside, obviously, is a heavy, very slow-firing, low-capacity weapon, where one shot makes or breaks it. Let's do a fun challenge this time: You have to hit headshots for this task. Aim high!
Click-Clack
How are bolt-actions feeling for ya? It's pretty hit or miss with people... no pun intended.
Kill 8 enemies with headshots with sniper rifles
They are long range, to be fair.
One to the head, two to the thorax. Which will it be? Headshots are more important... but thorax will hurt them badly.
One or two?
Clean shots, man! Good job.
Snipe Birdeye with an M700 or Sako TRG
I prefer one, but sometimes two is all you can do.

Sniper rifles are entirely built for extreme distances. While it's still a large bullet that will hurt like heck at close range, they are meant to be accurate and deadly at ranges that no other weapon can compete in. I'll calculate some shots for you, let's build up a distance. (Explanation of this task: The distance between you and the enemy you shoot will be added to the counter. The further you are from your enemy, the faster you will complete this challenge!)
The distance between us
Clean shots, man! Good job.
Land 20 headshots with sniper rifles
Land 15 thorax shots with sniper rifles
What a cheater...
You're run into the Goons already, correct? That one guy, who makes no noise when he runs... he confuses me. You're a better sniper than him, show him that no audio won't save him.
Hawk-eye
Very well done! That's not easy to do. Another death for that goon
80 kills... I only need 80 shots. Eh, maybe 85.

Alright, sniper. Here's your final challenge: 10 PMC kills with every sniper you can find in Tarkov. Headshots aren't required, but I recommend them. Also, I want to see how much distance you can gather doing this... steady your aim, friend.
Master of firearms: Sniper rifles
Very well done! You are now the master of the sniper rifles. Go on, marksman!
Kill 10 PMCs with the AXMC or Sako TRG
Kill 10 PMCs with the DVL-10
Kill 10 PMCs with the M700
Kill 10 PMCs with the Mosin (Infantry OR Sniper varient)
Kill 10 PMCs with the MP-18
Kill 10 PMCs with the SV-98
Kill 10 PMCs with the T-5000
Kill 10 PMCs with the VPO-215
Hit 'em with the layup
Grenades can be a complete game changes, if you use them correctly. Lethal grenades, unsuprisingly, are great for blowing up your enemies. Let's try that, shall we?
Hot potatoes
Nice throw! Let's keep working on that.
Kill 3 enemies with grenades
Kill 5 enemies with impact grenades
Quite a rude way to kill someone, tbh

You know what's even better than a grenade? An impact grenade. They detonate the moment they land, meaning that there's absolutely nothing your enemy can do to escape it, assuming you throw it correctly. Go give it a try.
No escape
Good throwing, man! Now let's swap to tacticals
Nevermind, that's more rude.
Tactical grenades might not be able to kill an enemy outright, but it can leave them as good as dead. A good flash grenade on an enemy completely ruins them. Kill 5 enemies that can't see you.
Dazed and Destroyed
On the bright side (heh), you probably took them out with a headshot, so they didn't feel much pain. I hope you took them out with a headshot, anyways...
Kill 5 stunned enemies
Time for a little testing. With explosives.

Lethal grenades have various fuses. Some are shorter, some are longer. Short fuses are great for suprising an enemy with a quick grenade, leaving little room for them to leave. Longer fuses are great for throwing further and bouncing around things. The M67 in partiuclar is great for baiting, as the long fuse time makes it more difficult to kill outright but will still force the enemy out. Try out the different fuse times and see what works best for you.
Fusing together
Did you end up preferring the shorter or longer fuses? Both have their strengths and weaknesses, and are highly contextual.
Kill 3 enemies with grenades that have a fuse shorter than 3 seconds
Kill 3 enemies with grenades that have a fuse longer than 3 seconds
Kill an enemy with the M67
Something about lamb sauce...
You know what time it is! Time to kill PMC with every thing in it's catagory! But you can't really kill people with flash grenades... hmm, oh well. Just kill some stunned PMCs.
Hell's kitchen
Gordon Ramsey is pleased... ahem. You're clearly quite good with grenades. Keep using them effectively now that your training is done!
Kill 3 PMCs with the F-1
Kill 3 PMCs with the M67
Kill 3 PMCs with the RDG-5
Kill 3 PMCs with the RGN
Kill 3 PMCs with the RGO
Kill 3 PMCs with the VOG-17
Kill 3 PMCs with the VOG-25
Kill 7 stunned PMCs
I think there are going to be some casualties in the weapons department by the end of this.

Troubleshooting is a lifesaving skill when you're in trouble. The quicker you can identify what's wrong and fix it, the higher chance you can survive a malfunction. You can just run guns that are max durability... but that can get expensive. Besides, if you ever have to pick up a gun, that's likely not going to be at full durability. This is also why it's important to play smart no matter what, as you never know when something can go wrong. Though, if something is to go wrong, you need to know what to do about it. Prove to me you can clear a malfunction.
Your gun has an issue
Did that malfunction happen before or after you got the kill? See, it can happen any time, and it's extremely problematic. Working on this skill is a very good idea.
Clear any malfunction once
My poor firearms

Now that you've experienced a malfunction, let's talk about how it actually happens. There's a few different sources, but the worst offender is supressors. Some play nice with a gun, others really increase the wear and tear of a firearm. Go use the latter ones, and see what I mean.
Understanding the common cause
See? Even after just a couple hours, your firearm needs some repairing now.
This seems tedious

You can clear a malfunction from your favorite gun, sure. What about others? You can't use the same firearm the whole time, at least, with those traders forcing you to do a bunch of different stuff. Can you clear jams from other weapon types?
Should've gotten the extended warrenty
How about that, you can! Good, you should be surviving just fine now.
This thing is going to explode in my hands, I can just feel it...

Dust covers, suppressors, magazines... there's plenty of things that affect the durability burn and chance of malfunction. What if we combined all three of them at once? I want to show you how much these can affect the performance of a rifle..
That poor AKM
See how bad that is for the gun? You gotta be careful what you're putting on, or taking off, your firearms.
Kill 10 enemies in one raid using an AKM that has no dust cover, a suppressor with >+70 durability burn, and a magazine with high or very high malfunction chance.
Even at 0 durability??? Noted...

You know what's kinda funny? There are actually a few weapons in Tarkov that can't malfunction under any circumstance. The PPSH-41 is a shining example, but some other guns exist that will never break in this place. Go run around with them for a while as your final task.
Those that never fail
See? The accuracy decreases, sure, but they make great choices when you can't afford weapon repairs or just want to be sure that you can go for a long time with no issues.
Kill 100 enemies with weapons that cannot suffer jams (PPSH, MP18, MP43, revolvers, and LMGs [except the RPK-16!])
Playing on easy mode today.

Underbarrel Grenade launchers are a fantastic, albiet it very expensive, way of getting a pretty free kill on an enemy. The impact explosion and propelled nature means no one is safe from an instant death. Have fun with this one!
Noob tube!
Boom! Those things are nasty, aren't they? Let's keep using them.
Kill 5 enemies with underbarrel grenade launchers.
Someone's getting blown up today. I really hope it's not me. I guess I'll just try again if it's me... weird how that works

I know the M32A1 isn't an UNDERBARREL grenade launcher, but it's a grenade launcher, ok? And it's what Mr. Big Pipe uses. You know how these go by now, you gotta do it with his own weapon. Go explode that guy straight to the next life, literally
The bigger pipe
He's gonna take a while to respawn, that's for sure. Nice shot.
Kill Big pipe with the M32A1 MSGL grenade launcher
Seems a bit excessive, but I agree, they are annoying

The sniper scavs are quite annoying, right? They're just always there, no matter how many times you've cleared that sniper nest, they're back every raid. I don't know what's up with death not affecting Tarkov like it should. On the bright side, killing is now quite morally ambiguous! Anyways, see if we can send somewhat of a message to them. Take out 10 of them with your grenade launcher.
Questionable countermeasures
You're getting pretty good at aiming with these things. Let's try even further out, alright?
Kill 5 sniper scavs with UBGLs
Gonna need a ruler or something for this one.
So, you've seem how the grenades are propelled, yes? You know what that means... they can go quite a long distance. I want 10 kills over 100 meters away. Aim very high.
Artillery strike
Quite impressive! Those were really difficult shots, great aim.
Kill 10 enemies over 60 meters away with UBGLs
I mean... alright.

You're gonna need a lot of grenades for this one. For your final challenge, I want you killing 8 enemies with your UBGL. ...You've already done more than that? Oh, silly! You have to do it in one raid! Enjoy!
One man army
There's gonna be a lot of little bits lying around for a while... Good stuff, soldier.
Kill 8 enemies in one raid with UBGLs
This sets a bad precedent...

Acquiring capital
Oh, good! You're not broke. Money is critical to survival, even if we wish it wasn't.
Acquire 1000000 roubles
Acquire 6000 euros
Acquire 6500 dollars
I'm telling you, I don't want to work with this Jaeger guy, he makes me do weird stuff
You've got the cash, you've got some allies, and they would love to sell to you. Guns, medicine, cases, so many things. Why not take advantage of this?
Purchasing equipment

Spend \u20ac6K Euros

How exactly am I meant to 'understand' a celestial being?
So much money... where's all this stuff coming from anyways? I guess things keep respawning, so there's infinite wealth as long as you hang around. Well, lets push it to the limit.
Breaking the bank
My, my! Seems like all the traders can't stop talking about you. And to see how much you've done with me is quite impressive.
Spend a total of 30 million currency on trades (USD and EUR convert to roubles)
Earn a total of 15 million currency from trades (USD and EUR convert to roubles)
I enjoyed killing the scavs, by the way

'Light, how are you supposed to train my intelligence? Are you going to have me read books or something?' Hahaha... that's a good idea, actually. But no, I have something much more exciting for you. Riddles! Oh yes, I'm serious. We'll begin easily. Prapor once had a friend, a friend he wouldn't tell you about unless you wacked some scavs. Or used your intelligence center to look it up. Don't do that here, by the way. You'll ruin the fun. Anyways, where did this friend live?
The test begins
He was a good friend, so I've heard.
Locate the spot of the riddle
Are riddles customary with this thing?
There is something all humans need to live, more frequently than food, but less frequently than air. Somewhere, there is a large stash that one of your 'traders' took interest in. Where was this?
Thirsting for more
Nice! Don't forget to stay hydrated, while you're at it.
Locate the spot of the riddle
I choose what I'll use most, probably.

Alright, lets make things more difficult: In war, rarely is there a 'good' side. Sometimes, fighting for either side is wrong. Sometimes, fighting for either side is right. Sometimes, you get a choice which side you'll fight for. Sometimes, mass life or death hangs in the balance of one small thing: Who you tell. Do you do what is right? Is there a 'right?' Or do you tell the one who gives you the rewards you seek?
Raising the stakes
I am curious, who did you end up telling?
Find the spot of the riddle
No hints for the hard ones!

In a place created for creation, where the hammer falls on the unforged and unfortunate, a crash is heard in the dead of night. Black grains in blue packages are hidden, and the one who mends the biological has paid the one who mends the material. Tell me, where were the black grains laid?
Nearing the end
That was a tough one, eh? Will the last one be tougher, or easier? I suppose it depends on how well you know your stuff.
Mark the spot of the riddle with a 7mm shell
No hints for the hard ones!

Last one... let's make it difficult: Near the open sea, where the fish swam and the birds flew freely, Contract wars were waged. The sea, once cared for, now laps silently on the beach, and the wings no longer fly undisturbed. One bird, however, was determined to fly, but the eagles consumed the bird's attempt. Where does this bird lie?
The final riddle
Well done! You really know how to think. Or you happened upon it by accident, in which case, booooo. Oh well. You made it this far, good job.
Find the spot of the riddle
I suppose it's a nice change of pace.

Look, I know that you pmcs normally train your perception by looting things, and that's fine. But I think we're both getting tired of just picking up items. I have you doing that enough for Attention and Search. So, let's do something more exciting for this one, alright? We'll work on hearing things and spotting things. First, let's do some spotting. Take out some enemies at medium range, lets say, 50m or longer.
Changing the rules
Got a pretty good pair of eyes, eh? If only they could perceive the divine... oh well.
Kill 8 enemies at 50+ meters
This one might actually benefit me

Kill 3 enemies with the MSA Sordin headset
Kill 3 enemies with the FAST RAC headset
Kill 3 enemies with the Earmor M32 headset
Kill 3 enemies with the Comtac 2 headset
Kill 3 enemies with the Comtac 4

Kill 3 enemies with the Razor Digital headset
Kill 3 enemies with the XCEL 500BT
ALL KILLS MUST BE WITHIN 40 METERS
Is this a blessing or a curse?

We just went and tested all the headsets avaliable in Tarkov. Now, let's see how you fair with the opposite: Sound reduction. Heavy helmets are great for blocking a few rounds, especially from most scavs, but they also block your hearing. Will you fair just as well?
Noise cancellation
What do you think? Do you prefer the protection, or the hearing? Personally, I prefer the hearing. But then again, I need no protection where I'm at. The louder I can hear Him, the better.
Kill 20 enemies within 50 meters while wearing a helmet with high sound reduction (check wiki for list)
Well, screw me I guess

I think your hearing is just fine, let's conclude with something satisfying. You got some kills a medium distance a while ago, remember? But with scopes, even long distance can look like point blank range. So here's a challenge: I want you to kill someone that's further than 150 meters away from you. With only iron sights. Yep, no scopes, no reflex sights, no cheating by having iron sights equipped and welding a dovetail on the sight, just pure iron sights. Have fun!
Shot of the century
Wow. Just wow. I don't say this often, but I seriously wasn't expecting that. That's got to be the shot of the century or something.
Headshot an enemy over 150m away with iron sights.
Oh that's nice, the angel actually wants me to live.
Endurance, perserverance... hmm... well
The human will to live
Look at that, you can survive for more than 20 minutes!
Survive 3 raids in a row (run through does not count, but won't reset)
WHY?!? WHYYYYYY

Some people just like watching counters go up. Kinda weird, isn't it? I don't quite get it, I think work is best when you can't see the results so obviously, or track it so meticulously. Well, that's what I'm having you do this time, I suppose. The good news is this one is easy! Just run around a lot.
Marathon

Is Tarkov not a lovely place? I mean, everyone's killing each other, that ruins the tourism a bit. Or does it? You're here, haha. Anyways, it's a shame what happened. The beaches of Shoreline and Lighthouse, the shopping mall, the streets... so much destruction. Have you ever wondered if you could stop it, or are you only concerned about escaping?
Oh.
What to do with your last endurance task... hmm... I suppose just 'enduring' in general works. Sound good? Alright, go get 100 of them, without dying. They can't only be scavs, by the way.
A life well spent
Well, well... been a while since you died. What a mess you've made, though... eh, it all seems to reset anyways.
Kill 100 enemies without dying
15 of them being PMCs
3 of them being bosses (Each goon counts, but other guards don't)
I don't think this will feel good

What does it even mean to have 'health 0'? Whatever, let's fix that. I'm sure you've noticed that certain things happen to you sometimes when you're in combat. What happens if you're under an effect for a long time? Maybe you're looping painkillers, or you've got something you can't fix. Who knows?
Are you feeling it now?

So, did you survive? Either way, I can see your body preparing for that situation again. You're getting 'healthier' or something. What? I'm not a doctor, I'm an angel. The human understanding of medicine confuses me anyways. It's seen as so important and lifesaving, yet you hide it behind massive paywalls? Whatever happened to caring for the sick and needy? *sigh*... I'm getting off topic. Make sure you complete your other physical trainings.
Have any status effect for 10 minutes
Wait, doesn't this require me getting hurt a lot?

Having a bunch of health effects is one thing. Do you know how to treat them? What do you do when you've been shot, arms broken, insides spilling outward? I mean, sure, you just die and come back, you always do. But what if you didn't die? Show me that you know how to use medicine. I do not care what kind of medicine, use whatever you fancy. Just make sure all your bases are covered.
Medical Master
You clearly know how to take care of yourself and respond to crisis. Good, good!
Use any medical item (including stims) a total of 300 times
Looks like I need to become a master of all trades

Why didn't we start with this idea?
I feel a little bad about what I asked you to do last time... maybe we should just stick to the people that know about this. You have a medical professional here, correct?
Knowing the professionals
So you do! Good, I don't think we'll need to do any more experiments with your body from now on. Sorry about that!
Reach LL4 Therapist
I don't think this is how immunity works.

Your immune system has gotten a lot stronger through all this! However, it's not the type of thing you 'want' to put to the test. So, let's eliminate the source of the toxin, shall we? Or, more accurately, eliminate those who seek to weaponize it. Those cultists interfere with my work anyways, worshipping whatever satanic deity they do. It probably is satan himself, from what I've seen of them. Two birds with one stone, eh?
Immunity through extermination

I'd love to say something like 'good job, you really messed them up!' but that didn't even leave a mark on their prescence. They're talking about you know, and seek your painful death, but that's about it. There will always be worshippers of evil, I suppose... I fear how many we see nowadays. Makes me thing the Lord's coming back is soon. Oh well. I'll let you know what we should do next.
Kill 25 cultists
Am I seriously going through with this? This is going to be the most painful thing I've ever experienced.

Hey, so... I know I've said a lot about how we're not going to run experiments on your body anymore, and I meant that. I'm sorry in advance for what I have to ask of you next. You see, when a pathogen is in your body that your body doesn't like, it creates antibodies to fight it off. It also keeps a 'record' of the pathogen to be able to fight it off more effectively. The reason people keep getting sick from the 'same' sickness is because it mutates. However, I've noticed that whatever toxin those cultists have created, there's only one strain. It's one specific poison. ...I'm going to judge by the look on your face that you've figured out where this is going. I'm sorry, friend. 5 minutes should be long enough for your body to get enough information on it. Keep yourself alive, alright?
Ultimate Innoculation

Did it work? Oh, praise the Lord! You've built up a serious resistance to the pathogen by doing that, it should never be that bad again. It looks like you had strengthed your immune system enough before this that it had a much easier time fighting that. Did I mention you're the first person to survive that? Well done, well done! Celebrate with a few more cultist deaths for me, will ya? Hahahaha!!!
Survive a posioning for five minutes
Consume some quality jerky
Consume a college student's meal (Instant noodles)
This angel is starting to seem like the ghost of Jaeger future...

You know those moments where you are just so exhausted, so low on energy, but you've gotta push just a liiiiittle bit longer? Yeah, that can happen in combat too. Will you be capable of shooting straight when you've got almost nothing left?
Running on fumes
So you can! Seems like there's nothing you can't do. Although, you have unlimited attempts, haha.
Kill an enemy while suffering from either exhaustion and dehydration
I might gain some weight doing this

Found your limit? The good news is that it can only go up from here. Keep working!
Achieve critical overweight in raid.
Not the strangest thing you'll ask me to do, is it?

Look at you, putting on some muscle! I have a fun idea for you, a way to jump around like a little kid again. You see, there's a couple spots that require a certain 'strength level' to reach. Do you think you're there yet? Or do you need a while longer? Oh, and don't worry. IncreasedClimbHeight won't help you here. Uhm, you probably want a lighter kit as well... (TESTED AT STRENGTH 15 WHILE NOT OVERWEIGHT)
Parkour
How about that? You made it there in the end. Good job, Mr. Monkey. The last challenge won't be so pretty.
Reach the top of the yellow bus in Scav Town on Woods
Reach the ladder on the red container of the scav tower on Woods
Reach the top of container/house 44 in the storage area on Customs
Reach the top of the left fuel tank in the row of 4 fuel tanks near construction on Customs
Nothing personal, kid

Alright, you want a really challenge? Those bosses around Tarkov, they seem pretty tough. Most got guards or heavy armour, better accuracy, more health... how does more health even work anyways? Ah well, you're gonna knock one down big time. Pick your favorite one around tarkov, and kill him with a melee weapon. Feel free to weaken him with bullets if you must, I'd recommend a flashbang as well, but the killing blow has to come from a melee weapon. Let's see you prove your strength.
Gladiator
That look on your face... ...you enjoyed that, didn't you?
Kill a boss with a melee weapon and survive the raid.
But why?

Pain is a hard sensation to override. It seizes control of you, it makes you want to curl up and hold the afflicted area tightly. Unfortunately, you find yourself in a situation where that will only lead to more pain, and then death. Well, whatever death means to you. It's bad regardless, so you need to learn to fight that sensation off.
No pain, no gain

You barely flinched, and those were some gnarly wounds! You've defintiely got your pain receptors under control. But there's more than just some subcutaneous stimulators to worry about, let us continue.
Kill five enemies while suffering pain
BUT WHY?

You can override your pain, and that's important. But what happens when you can't override something? You can't override a stun grenade thourgh sheer willpower. Or can you? Perhaps you can fight through it? I don't know, you show me.
Dazzled, not deterred

That was a stunning performance! .....anyways, you really suprised me there. I thought a stun grenade was the end of a fight, but you proved that nothing can prevent you from killing. Hmmm... is that a bad thing?
Kill three enemies while suffering contusion or stunned
I'm starting to think this thing is a sadist

You have to be careful with a fresh wound. It can get infected, it can start bleeding again, it can swell, there's a whole lot of things that can go on. They heal over time, though. The human body has amazing regenerative capabilities. However, no one in Tarkov is going to wait a few days for you to 'get well'. It's only something to take advantage of here. Show them that you don't need to wait.
Wounds heal

I can read your thoughts, by the way. I'm not sadistic, this isn't a pleasure for me. I'm here to train you to survive in Tarkov for a greater purpose. I understand why you feel that way though, I hope you can forgive me. I have one more thing to ask of you, anyways. Oh, and good job surviving out there while wounded. Getting beat up does not make it any easier to fight back
Kill 30 enemies while having a fresh wound
A different kind of stress...

So far, I've been testing your ability to handle individual things. Pain, blindness, severe wounds. For your final test, we'll do something different, perhaps something more enjoyable. Let's see how you do against a horde of people coming after you!
Current objective: KILL
So much blood in such a short time... and you look like you had fun. Horrifying. Go on, then; I don't think anything will stress you out.
Complete either of the options in one raid and survive
I don't think I needed to be asked this...

You wanna hear something painfully obvious? Bleeding isn't good. Yet there sure as heck seems to be a lot of blood spilled in this region. I'm actually not great with blood myself... I don't get sick or anything, I just dislike seeing it except for very specific circumstances. Do me a favor, keep your blood inside your body. I think it'd appreciate it as well.
No time to bleed
Good! I'm glad to see that you know how to patch yourself up.
Stop 7 bleeds
What is this supposed to accomplish?
You've proved to me that you know how to stop a bleeding. What if you're out of supplies, though? Can you survive that serious loss of blood pressure and energy? Try not to pass out in the process.
Bled dry
Why on earth did you listen to me? Goodness, you look pale as a sheet. Please tell me you have a bloodbag somewhere.
Survive a heavy bleed for five minutes
Something a little more agreeable...

I still can't believe you survived that. Just how on earth does your body regenerate from such wounds? Even losing so much blood, you kept going. I don't understand yet, but I don't need to. And I definitely don't need to see you bleed that much again. I don't think you'd want to either. Prove to me that you know how to fix yourself up, including your bones.
Never again
Not enough.
Use any bleed or fracture-fixing item 25 times (exlcuding medkits)
I didn't know I could piss off an angel...
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: More, more! Not just blood, not just broken bones, I want everything!! Do you even know what its like watching you die so many times? Do you even know you're dying? How many times can you die so painfully, so slowly, and still go out there guns blazing? What is wrong with you? You have to know how to use EVERYTHING to keep yourself alive!
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: To be free from death
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: Yes! Thank you. Keep yourself alive, for your own sake? I wasn't kidding when I said I don't like seeing you die. If I haven't told you already, I don't particularly care for blood and death and corpses, not least the blood and corpse of someone I'm suppose to be helping. Having to watch you die all the time is painful... so die less, alright?
finish_summary: CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem] || CounterCreator[UseItem]

english: Use an AI-2 30 times
Use a CAR 30 times
Use an IFAK 30 times
Use an AFAK 30 times
Use a Salewa 30 times
Use a Grizzly 30 times
Use an Aseptic bandage 5 times
Use an Army bandage 5 times
Use an Esmarch 5 times
Use a CAT 5 times
Use a CALOK 5 times
Use an Immobilizing splint 5 times
Use an Aluminum  5 times
Use a CMS kit twice
Use a SURV-12 kit twice
Use any stimulant that provides health regen 8 times.
Not like I had a sleep schedule to begin with

The art of moving silently is a lot less artistic when you're carrying the weight of dead men's souls on your back. Oh, also their guns and gear. Regardless, knowing how to move quietly will save your life more often than you think. Especially if those you are fighting are more... SAIN than usual, if you know what I mean. Learn how to kill your enemey without them knowing where it came from. Let's start easily, with the assistance of the night.
Taking a night off
Getting familiar with the evening times? Good, there's a lot more of it in your near future. Don't forget to sleep at some point.
Kill 10 enemies between 9PM-4AM
What if I was already using a suppressor?

The darkness is nice and all, but you know what I just thought of? The darkness doesn't conceal how loud your gun is. Or how loud you are. I mean, the whole point of *covert* movement is to be quiet, sneaky? Show me how it's done.
Silent night
Wow, that was so quiet I was able to sleep through the night. Thanks
Kill 15 enemies between 9PM-4AM while using a suppressor
Oh, lovely.
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: There's a lot of different ways you can manipulate your body to provide momentum. There's quite a lot of speeds you can do it at, as well. Not only are most of these ways helpful for movement, but sometimes it's advantages for killing, getting a good angle on your opponent. Let's see just how well you can take advantage of the terrain around you.
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: So many ways to move (and kill)
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: Hehe, look at you squirming all over the place. That's how you do it, though. Put aside how it looks, it helps you survive.
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: Move 400 units in covert movement
quest_name: So many ways to move (and kill)

english: Anyone remember the Spectre from BO1? Just me? Alright...

Alright, we've gotten plenty of practice, and I've shown you everything there is to be learned about stealth. Now, I have a fun challenge for you. Go to the customs or the mall, and kill three of those PMC guys. The catch? You can't get hurt whatsoever. If you get shot once, you gotta retry. If you break your leg, that's not quiet enough, and you're an idiot. I'd say 'Godspeed' to you, but that won't help this time.
Spectre
Perfection. You are a terror in the night.
Kill 3 PMCs in one night raid, on Customs or Interchange, with a suppressor, without taking damage
Finally. Vitaman D

The night is now yours, you strike all and are seen by none. A myth, an urban legend. The spectre of Tarkov. Unfortunately for you, the night doesn't last forever. Sometimes, it isn't even an option. Can the spectre haunt during the day, or will the sun protect the inhabitants of Tarkov?
A shadow in the daylight
And thus, a new Tarkov legend is born. Go on, Shadow of Tarkov.
Kill 6 enemies in one raid on Customs, Reserve, or Interchange, with a suppressor, without taking damage
Y'know, I don't know if I like you watching me in my hideout...

Considering you have a hideout, you sure learn how to make good use of it. You've built some modules by now, correct? Let me show you how to use it efficiently. We'll start off with some essentials, like medical supplies. Go make a few things at that medstation of yours, stuff you might bring into raid.
Basic Medication
There you go! See if those help you out later today.
Complete 2 crafts at the Medstation
You know what they say about idle hands...

You know how to craft some basic medication, and that's good! But there's a lot more you can do in this place. You can make ammo, armor, even entire weapons! Not to mention other important things like food, water, and things you can sell for profit. Let's try using all your workstations, really get you familiar with what you're working with.
A Proper Utilization of Resources
How about that? You got a whole factory going on in there, you can make just about anything you want. ...Hmm, y'know, 'factory' gives me an idea.
Complete 30 total non-cyclic crafts
Complete 3 crafts at the Workbench
New quest: Come back in five days. Sure, thanks Guiding Light.
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: Why do all this work yourself when you can have machines do it for you over time? I mean, let's ignore the fact that crafting seems to already happen automatically here; don't worry about that. Let's try *actual* automation, letting the station truly do it for you. There's three available in your hideout; put each of them to work.
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: If only you could craft an ammo case, haha! You're not going to have any ammo shortages for a while now, that's for sure. I just hope the quality is good enough, I know some of that ammunition can be... slightly less effective against some of the beefier dudes out there. Also, don't forget that the PMM can only be fired out of the klin, not the kedr
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: Collect Bitcoin three times
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: Collect Purified Water ten times
quest_name: This Totally Isn't a Factorio Reference

english: Work kills creativity, I suppose.

Oh, there's a fourth one of these? I ran out of ideas for this branch. Shoot, uhm... ... ... Oh, screw it. Just go make a bunch of stuff, I don't really care. You know how hard it is to come up with unique ideas every time? If I could make you craft specific things, that'd be nice, but that's hell itself to do. Go make 100 AI-2s for all I care.
We Needed a 4th Crafting Quest
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ..Oh, you did it. Uhm, well done! You're a, uh, a master crafter now. Yeah.
Complete 100 non-cyclic crafts
Heavy to wear, but heavy to knock down.

I'll be honest, I don't personally care for the heavy vests as much. They're just so, well... heavy. However, I cannot deny the sheer armour they provide, and that can be just as useful as mobility. Let's get you outfitted, shall we?
Protection is Paramount
Glad to see you're comfortable in these things. Onto the next one.
Kill 10 enemies while wearing heavy armour vests / rigs
Sure hope my spine holds up
They ain't kiddin when they say 'heavy', let me tell you. Most of them are pretty darn heavy. You already see where I'm going with this, I assume?
Fully covered
See how important plates can be? Even a class 3 can provide a lot of protection compared to just soft armour.
Kill 20 enemies while wearing a vest that can hold all 4 plates in (front, back, l side, r side)
Now we get to have a bit of fun.

Knowing how to wear heavy armour vests is nice and all, but knowing how to take it down is good too. Armour is great for you, but not so great when an enemy is wearing it. I want you to not only wear down their armour, but show me you know how to get around it as well.
Anti-material
Look at all that metal and ceramic on the floor. Think I saw a guy's arm on the counter as well. Very well done.
Deal a total of 1000 damage to enemy armour.
hv4 accept, I can't think of one rn
finish_summary: HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem

english: Y'know... armour is really only as good as the plate you put into it. Those big vests you wore for me last time... what did you have in them? Were you able to find nice, tier 6 plates? Or did you have to settle for some tier 4? Well, either way, let's get you some tier 6 ones. There's quite a few, each with different properties. Can you find one of each? I don't expect them brand new, don't worry. Take 'em off someone you kill, or not. Heck, if you wanna cheat, get em from a vendor or the market. The goal is to supply you with good protection, so, whatever accomplishes that.
finish_summary: HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem

english: Plate up!
finish_summary: HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem

english: Notice how there's some differences between the top tiers? Different weights, durabilities... pick what you like.
finish_summary: HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem || HandoverItem

english: Hand over an ESAPI level IV ballistic plate
Hand over a Kiba Arms Steel ballistic plate
Hand over a NESCO 4400-SA-MC ballistic plate
Hand over a KITECO SC-IV SA ballistic plate
Hand over a GAC 4sss2 ballistic plate
Hand over a Granit Br5 ballistic plate
Hand over a Cult Termite ballistic plate
They should've had their own fancy armour

english: Alright, last run with the heavy vests for training. You probably knew where this was going. The only thing I can train you on at this point is to simply get experience in every heavy armour vest. On the bright side, you don't have to do the rigs!

english: Now you know how every heavy vest feels! You should be able to wear any of them now without any issue, pick your favorite and keep it up! Don't forget to try light vests, if you haven't already.

english: 5 PMC kills while wearing the Zabralo
5 PMC kills while wearing the THOR
5 PMC kills while wearing a Slick
5 PMC kills while wearing the Redut-T5
5 PMC kills while wearing the Gen4 full
5 PMC kills while wearing the Gen4 Assault
5 PMC kills while wearing the Defender-2
5 PMC kills while wearing the Gen4 HMK
5 PMC kills while wearing the Redut-M
5 PMC kills while wearing the Korund-VM
5 PMC kills while wearing the 6b23-1
I've been reduced to an errand boy.
Gotten some work done on your hideout, I see! But, I know you have more to go. Find some additional parts for the rest of your hideout.
Finding materials
You should be able to build a few things with those! It'll be a good start, don't you think?
'Hand over' 5 bolts
'Hand over' 5 nuts
'Hand over' 5 metal parts
'Hand over' 2 corrugated hoses
Where exactly does this stuff 'go' when I hand it it?

You're starting to have a real operation going on here! You're making things, producing rations, really starting to thrive in the beautiful landscape of Tarkov. I want to make sure that you have enough resources to keep your little facility running. Looks like you needs filters and fuel.
Keeping the lights on
Wonderful! Glad to see you've got plenty of backstock for your hideout
'Hand over' two FIR air filters
'Hand over' 10 FIR water filters
'Hand over' 5 FIR fuel cans (either one)
This might take a while

You must have quite a nice place by now! Are ya winnin, son? Anyways, I heard there's a way to, erm, 'mine bitcoin'. I don't have any record of 'bitcoin' being a resource harvestable from the earth's crust, but apparently computers can do it? I don't understand what you humans come up with some times... don't get me wrong, I'm actually curious about it. Can you show me some of this 'bitcoin'?
Raking it in
It's a 'digital currency', you say? I don't even know, I shouldn't have asked... you can get away with anything nowadays. Hah, maybe you'll start selling pictures next. ...What's that look for?
'Hand over' 10 FIR bitcoin
Alliteration is Amazing

Light vests are likely what I would wear, if I was stuck in your situation. I personally care more about mobility than sheer defense. I don't need to be able to tank shots if I'm not getting shot, right? Being able to maneruver quickly is so important, especially since you're stuck here by yourself. Let's get you comfortable with these lighter vests and rigs, eh?
Mobility is Marvelous
Yeah, you're getting the hang of it! Let's get a little more specialized
Kill 10 enemies while wearing a light armour vest / rig
Stealth is a vital part of Metal Gear Solid Online for all players

Isn't it funnt that some 'light armour' really isn't that light? I mean, sure, some plates are made of armor steel, I don't expect that to be as light as a feather. But some small, weak plates still end up weighing more than they are worth. Beyond that, some vests end up weighing a lot just from all the 'soft' armour they have. Why don't you go try wearing light stuff? You might enjoy the newfound speed.
Light as a feather
Well, how about it? Can be nice when you're trying to offset big guns, ammo, and have more left over for all that loot you'll pick up in raid. It matters less as you work on your strength, though.
Kill 20 enemies while wearing only plates that weight <2KG, in a vest that *BY ITSELF* weighs <5KG.
Buy now, and you'll get a second class 2 armour for free!

Class 2 armour is... pretty bad, I won't lie. However, it's usually the lightest armour you can get, while still protecting you from weak rounds that most scavs will be firing at you, as well as some early level PMCs. Knowing how to effectively use these weaker armour can really help out, especially for the rougher seasons when you're on a budget.
Pellets B gone
What'd you think? Super light, but keeps the shotguns and pistols away
Kill 25 enemies while wearing the 6B2, Module-3M, or PACA armour.
I suppose those would be important.

As much as these armour vests are all about not getting shot in the first place, it's still bound to happen eventually. You should have a repair kit on standby for when you get ambushed by a group of scavs with shotguns. Find two, while you're at it. Having a backup is important!
Preparing repairs
Sweet! Just those should last you a long time. Don't forget to find another one BEFORE you run out of repairing, though.
Find 2 armour repair kits FIR
Killa got nothing on me
